claims.statement: Lærdal Tunnel length is at least 4× larger than Appalachian Trail length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Lærdal Tunnel length: 24.51 km. Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km.

claims.statement: Category 5 hurricane threshold is slower than Speed of sound in water.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Category 5 hurricane threshold: 252 km/h. Speed of sound in water: 5328 km/h.

claims.statement: Lærdal Tunnel length is at least 4× longer than Channel Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Lærdal Tunnel length: 24.51 km. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer bits in a byte than known chemical elements.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 8 bits vs 118 elements.

claims.statement: First SMS sent happened before First powered flight.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. First SMS sent: 1992. First powered flight: 1903.
